title: What real weaknesses do the Evas have
display_title: What real weaknesses do the Evas have
wikitext:
[]: What real weaknesses do the Evas have?             Quote Post by CyberXIII » Tue Jun 02, 2009 3:47 pm Besides the obvious ones (kill the pilot=no mecha/ remove a leg), what weaknesses do the Evas have?

[]:             Quote Post by Baz » Tue Jun 02, 2009 3:54 pm Antimatter.

[]:             Quote Post by CyberXIII » Tue Jun 02, 2009 3:58 pm Baz wrote: Antimatter.

[]:             Quote Post by Axell » Tue Jun 02, 2009 4:22 pm quantum tunneling

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Tue Jun 02, 2009 5:06 pm The obvious one is shown repeatedly in the series -- tripping over the extension cord and running out of power. An Eva is no Duracell bunny. Also when fighting an away match, h4x powers from other continuities.

[]:             Quote Post by Zaque » Tue Jun 02, 2009 5:27 pm Here's another obvious one, skewering by Lance of Longinus. And maybe their size too. i.e. they can't do much against that angel in 13...

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Tue Jun 02, 2009 6:12 pm Core damage.

[]:             Quote Post by CyberXIII » Tue Jun 02, 2009 6:38 pm Reichu wrote: Core damage.

[]:             Quote Post by Baz » Tue Jun 02, 2009 6:54 pm I should have asked what can get through an ATF.

[]:             Quote Post by Electric Sachiel » Tue Jun 02, 2009 11:13 pm Baz wrote: I should have asked what can get through an ATF.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Tue Jun 02, 2009 11:15 pm Well, I dunno about 01. Ramiel's aim was a little too high for that. I think. Or maybe I'm not thinking this through completely...

[]:             Quote Post by Electric Sachiel » Tue Jun 02, 2009 11:21 pm Reichu wrote: Well, I dunno about 01. Ramiel's aim was a little too high for that. I think. Or maybe I'm not thinking this through completely...

[]:             Quote Post by Timstuff » Wed Jun 03, 2009 1:04 am Rei's piloting.

[]:             Quote Post by xtr00kvltcorex » Wed Jun 03, 2009 9:41 am the pilots.

[]:             Quote Post by SaltyJoe » Wed Jun 03, 2009 10:36 am xtr00kvltcorex wrote: the pilots.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Wed Jun 03, 2009 10:58 am CyberXIII wrote: I should have asked what can get through an ATF.

[]:             Quote Post by Axell » Wed Jun 03, 2009 11:19 am awww, thats beautiful

[]:             Quote Post by NemZ » Wed Jun 03, 2009 12:19 pm "That was just pillow talk, baby." -Ash

[]:             Quote Post by AuraTwilight » Wed Jun 03, 2009 1:12 pm Reichu wrote: CyberXIII wrote: I should have asked what can get through an ATF.

[]:             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Wed Jun 03, 2009 3:44 pm AuraTwilight wrote: Reichu wrote: CyberXIII wrote: I should have asked what can get through an ATF.
